# kIOHIDValueOptionsFlagPrevious

**Enumeration Case**

An option to retrieve the element’s previous value.

## Declaration

```swift
kIOHIDValueOptionsFlagPrevious
```

## Getting the Options

- **kIOHIDValueOptionsFlagRelativeSimple**: An option to return a simplified version of the value.
- **kIOHIDValueOptionsUpdateElementValues**: An option to update the element’s value before returning it.
